name: 07_vwap_is_negative_skipped
description: Holding present in live_vwaps but vwap < 0 (degenerate) -> the `if v > 0:` guard skips it.
derivation: AAPL is in live_vwaps; v=-10.0. The producer's `if v > 0:` guard fails (negative is not > 0). Inner block skipped. valid_vwap_weight += alloc is inside the v > 0 branch, so the holding contributes 0 to BOTH accumulators. Final: (0.0, 0.0).
